## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the roadmap phase / issue if any. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` + `npm run lint` green; new tests cover this change
- [ ] `npm run build` passes; entry chunk not bloated (heavy libs stay lazy)
- [ ] **Works logged out** (incognito) — Golden Rule 2
- [ ] Phone pass at ~390 px (and largest font size)
- [ ] `@` alias used; auth token not read from React; no `tailwind.config.js`
- [ ] Bilingual copy via `useAppI18n` where user-facing
- [ ] Docs updated (`CLAUDE.md` / `docs/` as applicable)
